commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an opt-in `localModelLeanProfile: "basic" | "strict"` experimental agent config, implements strict local-model tool filtering, and updates config schema/help/docs/tests.

PR surface: Source +44, Tests +232, Docs +21, Generated 0. Total +297 across 14 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is an opt-in config feature PR rather than a bug report. The branch does include focused tests that exercise the proposed basic and strict filtering behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainer review is needed because the branch adds a new experimental config key; the docs bug is mechanical, but accepting the surface is a compatibility/product decision.

target.title: feat(agents): add strict local model lean profile
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `localModelLeanProfile: "basic" | "strict"` under agent experimental config.
- Preserve existing `localModelLean: true` behavior as the default `basic` profile.
- Put the broader local-model trim behind explicit `localModelLeanProfile: "strict"`; strict mode keeps a closed coding/status allowlist, including the paired code-mode `exec`/`wait` controls.
- Refresh the generated config schema baseline for the new experimental config field.

Related https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/87617.
Related https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/86599.

## Verification

- `node scripts/docs-list.js`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts --reporter=dot` - passed, 88 tests across 2 shards on `fd9779752f5`.
- `node --import tsx scripts/generate-config-doc-baseline.ts --check`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/schema.labels.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-runtime.ts`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main` - clean before the final rebase/baseline refresh; no accepted/actionable findings.
- AWS Crabbox focused proof before the latest unrelated main rebase: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_e3a2859f1aac`, slug `tidal-barnacle`, run `run_6540a0bc2495`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, `leaseStopped=true`; focused Vitest passed 88/88.
- AWS Crabbox changed-gate note: `check:changed` reached current-main lint and failed only on unrelated `ui/vite.config.ts` `typescript(prefer-includes)` at lines 123-124, outside this PR's diff. Core/coreTests typecheck and earlier changed guards passed before that lint failure.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: smaller local-model agents can opt into a stricter tool surface without changing what existing `localModelLean: true` users get.

Real environment tested: local linked OpenClaw worktree for focused source, schema, and docs proof; AWS Crabbox Linux for changed-gate/typecheck/lint attempt and focused branch tests.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts src/config/config.schema-regressions.test.ts src/config/zod-schema.agent-defaults.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node --import tsx scripts/generate-config-doc-baseline.ts --check`; `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`; `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`; AWS Crabbox run `run_6540a0bc2495` with `pnpm check:changed` plus the same focused Vitest command.

Evidence after fix: focused tests passed 88/88 on current head `fd9779752f5`; config baseline, docs MDX, docs formatting, TS formatting, and diff whitespace checks are clean; AWS focused test proof passed on the prior rebased head with the same patch content.

Observed result after fix: `localModelLean: true` still defaults to the original `basic` trim, `localModelLeanProfile: "strict"` is ignored unless lean mode is enabled, and strict mode filters the visible tool surface to the minimal coding/status set.

What was not tested: A live Ollama/API small-model agent turn was not run for this PR; live model compatibility is covered by the separate small-model matrix work. A fully green `check:changed` is currently blocked by unrelated current-main lint in `ui/vite.config.ts`; split fix: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88478.
target.author: vincentkoc
